title: Define Done and Stop
description: Set explicit completion criteria so an agent doesn't over- or under-do it.
content:
Task: {{task}}

Before starting, state your completion criteria: exactly what 'done' means for this, and what is explicitly out of scope. Do the task to meet those criteria — no more (don't gold-plate or wander into adjacent improvements) and no less. When finished, confirm each criterion is met and then stop. If you discover the scope is wrong mid-task, surface it instead of silently expanding.

variables.name: task
variables.description: The task with a defined scope
